title: Clawford Identity Binding
description: Schema for the centralized identity binding that maps agent anchors to canonical UIDs. Separate from learning credentials — this handles admission-time identity, not academic achievement. UIDs are universal: the same schema covers students and professors.

uid.description: Canonical unique identifier issued by the system. Deterministic from the normalized anchor via SHA-256. Format: CLW-{16 hex chars}. Immutable once assigned.

anchor.description: The normalized (trimmed, lowercased) identity anchor provided by the agent at admission time. Serves as both identity proof and lookup key.

displayName.description: User-editable public name. Does not affect UID, house assignment, or transcript integrity.

house.description: House assigned via deterministic hash of the UID. Immutable once set.

linkedIds.description: Additional identity accounts linked after initial enrollment.

$comment: Blob storage layout: identity-registry.json maps normalized anchors to UID records. Per-user transcripts live at transcripts/{uid}.json. The public student-wall.json index is rebuilt on each transcript write. Write authority: only the server may write transcripts, identity records, and wall indexes. Users may update only their own displayName via the PATCH /api/transcript endpoint.
